overall.description: A stationary first-person perspective from a cyberpunk video game shows a foggy, neon-lit city street at night. The player observes various futuristic vehicles driving through the misty urban canyon, including a sequence where a red car stops in the road before accelerating away, culminating in a vehicle crashing in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary first-person perspective of a foggy, neon-lit cyberpunk street that shifts from a moment of static tension to a chaotic traffic accident. It begins with a black sedan gliding through the mist, followed by a red sedan that comes to a complete halt in the center of the road beside a parked green vintage car. The scene remains momentarily hushed with only distant headlights piercing the fog, before the stillness breaks as both the red and green cars suddenly accelerate and speed away to the right. As the street briefly empties, a black sedan and an orange car pass through from left to right, leading into a final abrupt movement. The sequence culminates as another black sedan enters from the left and crashes violently into the right foreground, remaining stationary while distant traffic continues to drift through the hazy urban canyon.
